creator: mi@privatelabs.com
text:
The  gphoto's  web-site   appears  jazzy,  but  somewhat
	mismanaged.   Currently  they   have   (at  least)   two
	separate   lists   of   supported  cameras,   of   which
	the  http://www.gphoto.org/cameras2.html   appears  more
	detailed and  complete. The  link offered in  the port's
	DESCR no longer exists at all.
